question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 37.00% on 2026-03-13 for the Metaculus question "Will the US establish a government program rewarding information leading to deportations before January 3, 2027?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP for the deportation reward program question will exceed 37% on March 13, 2026. The CP is currently 35% (2 points below threshold) with a clear multi-month downward trend: 50% (Dec) → 44% (Feb) → 35% (Mar 2). All proposed state-level bounty bills (MS HB1484, MO SB72) have died. ICE's skip-tracing contracts hire corporate surveillance firms, not civilian tipsters, so they don't match the resolution criteria. The CP shows enough volatility for brief bounces (e.g., 33% to 38% on Mar 1), but the persistent downward trend and lack of qualifying catalysts make it more likely the CP stays at or below 37% on the specific resolution date. Monte Carlo simulations with observed volatility yield 11-34% probability depending on drift assumptions, with a weighted estimate of ~26%.

factors.description: CP currently at 35%, 2 percentage points below the 37% threshold. Needs to rise to resolve YES.
Clear downward trend in CP: 50% (Dec) → 44% (early Feb) → 35% (Mar 2). Persistent multi-month decline driven by absence of qualifying programs.
No active legislation or government programs matching resolution criteria. MS HB1484 died Feb 2025, MO SB72 died May 2025. ICE skip-tracing is contractor-based, not civilian tip rewards.
CP has shown brief bounces (e.g., 33% to 38% on Mar 1), demonstrating enough short-term volatility to potentially cross 37% on any given day.
Monte Carlo simulation with observed volatility: P(CP>37%) = 11% (continued trend) to 34% (stable). Weighted ~26%.
10 months remain until underlying question deadline (Jan 2027), so some forecasters may maintain moderate probabilities, preventing further sharp CP decline.

reasoning:
**Forecast: 27% probability (YES)**

Key reasoning:
- **Current CP: 35%**, needs to be >37% on March 13 — it must rise 2+ points
- **Strong downward trend**: CP has fallen from 50% → 35% over 3 months, with no reversal catalyst
- **No qualifying programs exist**: Both state-level bounty bills (MS, MO) died; ICE skip-tracing hires contractors, not civilian tipsters
- **Volatility provides some upside**: Brief bounces (33%→38% on Mar 1) show CP *can* cross the threshold, but the trend makes it unlikely to stick
- **Monte Carlo result**: ~26% weighted probability across trend scenarios, which I adopt at 27%
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the US establish a government program rewarding information leading to deportations before January 3, 2027?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/36331)
